subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Thanks be unto Thee, that Thou hast made these destitute ones rich in spirit and guided these wandering souls to the pathway of guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار شکر ترا که اين بينوايان را پر نوا نمودی و اين گمراهان را به راه هدايت
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
